.github/workflows/main.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.1.4 to align with the Java 21 migration target.
Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2022.0.4 for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.1.x.
Remove spring-cloud-starter-bootstrap dependency as it is no longer needed with Spring Boot 3.1+ configuration changes.
Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x with HttpClient 5.x to align with Spring Boot 3.x dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE and HttpClient 5; HttpClient 4 is incompatible or deprecated in this context.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit encoding configuration from maven-checkstyle-plugin as it defaults to UTF-8 in newer versions.

src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity.httpBasic() call to accept a Customizer argument to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/app/config/WebSecurityConf.why_exists: Compile error: method httpBasic() is no longer available without arguments in Spring Security 6; it requires a Customizer parameter.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Replace deprecated getRawStatusCode() with getStatusCode() in HttpClientErrorException.
src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.why_exists: getRawStatusCode() is deprecated in Spring Framework 6.x (used by Spring Boot 3.x) and may be removed in future versions; using it causes deprecation warnings and potential runtime issues if the method is removed.

src/main/java/com/mpalourdio/springboott.general_idea: Change the field type from Boolean wrapper to boolean primitive to align with Spring Boot 3.x JPA provider expectations.
Change the parameter type of the repository method from int to boolean to align with the entity field type and Spring Data JPA conventions.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add Spring Cloud Config client configuration properties to enable externalized configuration via a config server.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.after:
encrypt.key=secretpassphraseolol

spring.application.name=springboottemplate
configserver.import=configserver:http://localhost:8888
spring.config.import=${configserver.import}
spring.cloud.config.import-check.enabled=false
spring.cloud.config.username=user
spring.cloud.config.password={cipher}12c545c7e569d579c0b205bfebeef99dcbf07c0d079b4035ce2980ef6ef2301e

#fail-fast=false is the default value
spring.cloud.config.fail-fast=true
spring.cloud.config.profile=integration

src/test/resources/test.properties.general_idea: Add a workaround property to prevent Spring Cloud Config from attempting to import configuration during tests.
